items.name: urlreeper
items.description: URLReeper is a blazing-fast, hybrid web crawling and spidering framework built in Go for security reconnaissance. It seamlessly combines passive discovery via web archives (Wayback, OTX) with highly concurrent active scanning and full Chromium headless browser rendering. Features include SPA support, JS endpoint extraction, and smart deduplication.
